top3.sql:
SELECT atom1.element || '-' || atom2.element AS connected_atoms
FROM connected c
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
JOIN atom atom1 ON c.atom_id = atom1.atom_id
JOIN atom atom2 ON c.atom_id2 = atom2.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single';

SELECT a1.element AS atom1, a2.element AS atom2
FROM connected c
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single';

final.sql:
SELECT atom1.element || '-' || atom2.element AS connected_atoms
FROM connected c
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
JOIN atom atom1 ON c.atom_id = atom1.atom_id
JOIN atom atom2 ON c.atom_id2 = atom2.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single';
